briefdescription.para: System-wide macro to denote "forever" in milliseconds.

detaileddescription.para: Usage of this macro is limited to APIs that want to expose a timeout value that can optionally be unlimited, or "forever". This macro can not be fed into kernel functions or macros directly. Use SYS_TIMEOUT_MS instead.

briefdescription.para: System-wide macro to denote "forever" in microseconds.

detaileddescription.para: See SYS_FOREVER_MS.

memberdef.name: SYS_TIMEOUT_MS_INIT
memberdef.initializer: Z_TIMEOUT_TICKS_INIT((ms) == SYS_FOREVER_MS ? \ K_TICKS_FOREVER : Z_TIMEOUT_MS_TICKS(ms))

briefdescription.para: System-wide macro to initialize k_timeout_t with a number of ticks converted from milliseconds.

memberdef.name: SYS_TIMEOUT_MS
memberdef.initializer: ((k_timeout_t) SYS_TIMEOUT_MS_INIT(ms))

briefdescription.para: System-wide macro to convert milliseconds to kernel timeouts.

memberdef.name: sys_clock_hw_cycles_per_sec
memberdef.initializer: (uint32_t)CONFIG_SYS_CLOCK_HW_CYCLES_PER_SEC

simplesect.para: system timer frequency in Hz

memberdef.name: k_sec_to_cyc_floor32
memberdef.initializer: z_tmcvt_32(t, Z_HZ_sec, Z_HZ_cyc, Z_CCYC, false, false)

detaileddescription.para: 32 bits. Truncates.
Converts time values in seconds to hardware cycles. Computes result in 32 bit precision. Truncates to the next lowest output unit.

simplesect.para: Generated. Do not edit. See above.
The converted time value in hardware cycles. uint32_t

memberdef.name: k_sec_to_cyc_floor64
memberdef.initializer: z_tmcvt_64(t, Z_HZ_sec, Z_HZ_cyc, Z_CCYC, false, false)

detaileddescription.para: 64 bits. Truncates.
Converts time values in seconds to hardware cycles. Computes result in 64 bit precision. Truncates to the next lowest output unit.

simplesect.para: Generated. Do not edit. See above.
The converted time value in hardware cycles. uint64_t

memberdef.initializer: z_tmcvt_32(t, Z_HZ_sec, Z_HZ_cyc, Z_CCYC, false, true)

detaileddescription.para: 32 bits. Round nearest.
Converts time values in seconds to hardware cycles. Computes result in 32 bit precision. Rounds to the nearest output unit.

simplesect.para: Generated. Do not edit. See above.
The converted time value in hardware cycles. uint32_t

briefdescription.para: Various helper APIs for converting between time units.
